docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY HUA, SHU XIN JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, SHIRLEY KAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
